diagnosis_note: Original detection used ref_subsample_kNN=100_000 which biases rare-cluster statistics. Full-kNN rerun gives p=1.000 across 3 marker definitions. TPEX is NOT detected at full-atlas flat-REAL scale (valid negative for state-regime rare type). Hierarchical-REAL at NMF T/NK compartment (15k, p=0.005, tau=84.6) required for detection.

tumor_only_check.note: Tumor-restricted rerun also gives p=1.0 — rules out normal-tissue dilution hypothesis

final_verdict: VALID NEGATIVE for flat-REAL at 1.22M; M-KANG-TNK-001 remains valid at NMF hierarchical scope
